data.title: Pitney Bowes appoints Todd Everett as President of SendTech, as part of strategic review since May 2025.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, Pitney Bowes Inc. (NYSE: PBI) revealed new undertakings as part of its strategic review initiated in May 2025. Todd Everett was appointed as EVP and President of Sending Technology Solutions ("SendTech"). This move comes as the company, known for its technology-driven shipping solutions, mailing services, and financial offerings worldwide, aims to enhance its operations. Mr. Everett's appointment signifies a pivotal step in the company's restructuring efforts.

data.title: OpenAI's future governance to be decided in billion-dollar deal with Microsoft, amid concerns over massive expenses.
data.description: The AI titan is on the verge of finalizing an agreement with Microsoft regarding its forthcoming management, although concerns linger about its substantial expenses.

data.title: CUPE local 1792 members rally in Cornwall to stop planned care time cuts at Glen Stor Dun Lodge, due to significant staffing shortages.
data.description: In Cornwall, Ontario, members of CUPE local 1792 organized a rally and information picket on Montreal Road to raise awareness about the proposed reductions in care time at Glen Stor Dun Lodge, a municipally-owned long-term care facility. The union, which represents workers at the lodge, highlighted that their members have faced severe staffing shortages for an extended period. The recently announced cuts to working hours are expected to exacerbate the already challenging working conditions at the publicly managed Long-Term Care facility. The protest aimed to draw attention to this issue and urge authorities to address the situation promptly.

data.title: Huize Holding's Q2 EPS increased to $0.02 from a loss of $0.20 last year, with sales rising to $55.38 million from $38.94 million. First-year premiums jumped to 1.127 billion yuan ($158.316 million), and gross written premiums increased to 1.796 billion yuan. CEO aims to revolutionize insurance value chain with AI technology.
data.description: Shares of Huize Holding Limited (NASDAQ: HUIZ) are seeing an increase in premarket trading on Friday following the company's strong second-quarter performance. Their adjusted earnings per share for the quarter were two cents, a significant improvement from a loss of 20 cents in the same period last year. Quarterly sales also saw a substantial growth, reaching $55.38 million compared to $38.94 million in the previous year. Huize recorded a 73.1% increase in first-year premiums, totaling 1.127 billion Chinese yuan ($158.316 million), while gross written premiums rose by 34.4% to 1.796 billion yuan. This positive trend reflects the company's robust performance in the online insurance product and service sector.

data.title: Bitcoin reached $116,000 as Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin surged on ETF speculation. Over $357M liquidated, $552.8M inflows into Bitcoin ETFs.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are on the rise, with Bitcoin briefly reaching $116,000 during overnight trading. Current prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $114,966.63, Ethereum at $4,523.39, Solana at $239.16, XRP at $3.04, Dogecoin at $0.2603, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001269. In the past 24 hours, 119,454 traders were liquidated, amounting to $357.99 million in losses. Data from SoSoValue indicates $552.8 million flowed into spot Bitcoin ETFs, while Ethereum ETFs saw $113.1 million in inflows on Thursday. Analyst Ted Pillows mentioned Bitcoin's recent reclaiming of $113,500, with $117,200 cited as the next key level to watch, potentially leading to new all-time highs. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Litecoin (LTC) at $114.97 stabilizes with mixed signals, faces resistance at $124.77 and support at $106.38 for potential breakout.
data.description: The market price of LTC is currently at $114.97, with analysts observing mixed technical signals. Despite a positive momentum indicated by the MACD, there is significant resistance at $124.77. On the downside, crucial support is maintained at $106.38. Traders are closely monitoring these levels for potential shifts in the market.
